channel.title: Announcements on Oakestra
channel.description: Recent content in Announcements on Oakestra

item.title: Oakestra releases v0.4.410 (Conga)
item.description: We are proud to announce that Oakestra Conga 🪘 (v0.4.410) is here! This is the third major release of Oakestra and the rhythm of the new features will have you dancing!

item.title: Oakestra releases v0.4.4 (Bass)
item.description: We are proud to announce that Oakestra v0.4.4 (codename: Bass 🎸) is here! This is the second major release for Oakestra and it packs several goodies!

item.title: Oakestra releases v0.4.301 (Accordion)
item.description: We are proud to announce that Oakestra v0.4.301 (codename: Accordion 🪗) is here! This is also the first major release for Oakestra and marks the beginning of a periodic release cycle.
